wordplay_note: A dignified name for a cat
card_description: Horace (cat) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Nick and the Glimmung*. Peter's cat who plays a crucial role in the confrontation with Glimmung. Name note: A dignified name for a cat. The wise animal — PKD loved cats and gave them narrative importance. First appears in *Nick and the Glimmung*. Context: "Dick explores the relationship between man and the sentient "Mind" of the universe (Zebra/Hagia Sophia)."

linked_segments.summary: Dick explores the relationship between man and the sentient "Mind" of the universe (Zebra/Hagia Sophia). He posits that we are moving from being unconscious "servants" of the teacher-deity (Zebra) to
